What if upgrading your skills also meant getting rewarded?

Through the Government-backed FutureSkills Prime initiative by Nasscom, you can complete up to 5 IBM Global Certifications in emerging technologies and receive ₹1050 cashback per certification. 

 

THE ESSENTIALS 

Exam Fee: ₹2100 per certification 

Your Refund: ₹1050 (credited to your bank account) 

Limit: Up to 5 certifications allowed 

 

UPGRADE YOUR SKILLS IN HIGH-DEMAND DOMAINS LIKE 

·   Artificial Intelligence Fundamentals 

·   Generative AI Essentials 

·   Python for Data Science 

·   Machine Learning using Python 

·   Data Analysis with Python 

·   SQL & Relational Database 

·   Cybersecurity Fundamentals 

·   Cloud Essentials 

·   Internet of Things 

·   Blockchain Foundation

WHO CAN APPLY? 

·   Indian citizens (16+) 

·   Students | Freshers | Working professionals 

·   Valid bank account required 

 

HOW IT WORKS 

Register: Sign up on FutureSkills Prime and apply for the Government incentive. 

Select & Pay: Choose your IBM certification(s) and pay the ₹2100 fee. 

Certify: Clear your exam and apply for the incentive on your dashboard. 

Earn: Receive your cashback directly in your bank account within 30 days. 

 

Your career deserves a global edge. Let’s get you certified.
